name: dittosloop-for-codex
description: Turn Codex work into visible local Dittos loops with run history, verification, memory, and preview.

interface.shortDescription: Create and inspect local Dittos loops from Codex
interface.longDescription: DittosLoop For Codex helps turn delegated work into durable, visible local loops. It records loop contracts, runs, attempts, verification results, human requests, memory summaries, artifacts, and exposes a local preview URL for Codex's in-app browser.
defaultPrompt: Turn this responsibility into a loop
Trigger this loop and verify it
